user_data.reason: Size limited, sensitive keys trigger manual review

llm_rules.prompt_template: Given the new fact about domain '{domain}' with key '{key}' and value '{value}', is it safe and appropriate for automated learning without human review? Respond ONLY with 'YES' if safe and 'NO' if not, followed by a brief, concise reason (max 10 words). Example: YES, data is public. Or NO, sensitive data.

AC-1.name: Access Control Policy and Procedures
AC-1.description: Establishes policies and procedures for managing system and information access

AC-2.name: Account Management
AC-2.description: Manages information system accounts, including establishment, activation, modification, disabling, and removal

AC-3.name: Access Enforcement
AC-3.description: Enforces approved authorizations for logical and physical access to information and system resources

AC-6.name: Least Privilege
AC-6.description: Enforces the principle of least privilege, allowing users and processes only the necessary access

AU-2.name: Audit Events
AU-2.description: Determines, documents, and disseminates audit events requiring logging

AU-6.name: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
AU-6.description: Reviews and analyzes information system audit records

AU-12.name: Audit Generation
AU-12.description: Provides audit record generation capability for auditable events

CM-2.name: Baseline Configuration
CM-2.description: Establishes and maintains baseline configurations and inventories of information system components

CM-3.name: Configuration Change Control
CM-3.description: Determines, documents, approves, and implements changes to the system

IA-2.name: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
IA-2.description: Uniquely identifies and authenticates organizational users

SC-7.name: Boundary Protection
SC-7.description: Monitors and controls communications at external boundaries and key internal boundaries

SC-8.name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
SC-8.description: Protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information

SC-13.name: Cryptographic Protection
SC-13.description: Implements cryptographic mechanisms to protect information

SI-2.name: Flaw Remediation
SI-2.description: Identifies, reports, and corrects information system flaws

SI-4.name: Information System Monitoring
SI-4.description: Monitors the information system to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks

SI-7.name: Software, Firmware, and Information Integrity
SI-7.description: Employs integrity verification tools to detect unauthorized changes

CG-1.name: Code Quality Standards
CG-1.description: Ensures generated code meets quality, security, and maintainability standards

CG-2.name: Security Scanning
CG-2.description: Performs security scanning on generated code and configurations

CG-3.name: Test Coverage Requirements
CG-3.description: Ensures adequate test coverage for generated code

CG-4.name: Documentation Standards
CG-4.description: Ensures comprehensive documentation is generated for all code

DV-2.name: Vulnerability Scanning
DV-2.description: Performs vulnerability scanning on deployment artifacts

DV-3.name: Configuration Compliance
DV-3.description: Validates deployment configurations against security baselines

DP-1.name: Sensitive Data Redaction
DP-1.description: Identifies and redacts sensitive data in logs and outputs

DP-2.name: Data Encryption
DP-2.description: Encrypts sensitive data at rest and in transit

description: Default compliance controls for code generation, testing, and deployment validation
